text: been wanting to get into ai but individual stocks scare me. an etf like CHAT with nvidia micron and sk hynix all in one sounds perfect. is now actually a good time to buy though??
author: first_time_caller99

text: the thesis is simple. hbm is the bottleneck in ai infra and CHAT gives you the only two suppliers at scale. sk hynix 5.8% + micron 6% + samsung 4.3%. that's nearly 16% in memory. the dip is noise
author: thesis_driven_dan

text: been adding CHAT every month since $20. not checking til 2030. the international exposure alone makes it better than QQQ for pure ai plays. check back in 5 years
author: CCWaterBug

text: also worth noting margins are expanding across the whole hbm supply chain. micron guided 45%+ gross margins last quarter. the run rate on memory demand is real
author: data_dependent_1

text: depends on your timeline. if you're holding 3+ years any dip in an ai etf is fine. just don't yolo rent money. not financial advice but CHAT is solid long term
